techcrunch.title: Anthropic files to go public
techcrunch.summary: The company said Monday it has filed confidentially for an IPO.

techcrunch.title: This AI weather startup is out-forecasting government agencies
techcrunch.summary: Windborne Systems' newest weather forecasting model beats the best government predictions by days.

techcrunch.summary: Alternative search engine DuckDuckGo launches 'no AI' web extensions for Chrome and Firefox users.

techcrunch.summary: Environmental activist Erin Brockovich has a new mission.

techcrunch.title: Making sense of the debate over AI psychosis
techcrunch.summary: On the latest episode of Equity, we debate whether tech CEOs are "uniquely prone to AI psychosis."

techcrunch.title: SoftBank says it will invest up to €75 billion to build French data centers
techcrunch.summary: The goal, the firm said, is to develop and operate up to 5 gigawatts of additional data center capacity.

techcrunch.title: ‘What a joke’: Github Copilot’s new token-based billing spurs consternation among devs
techcrunch.summary: The golden age of Microsoft's Github Copilot appears to be at an end.

techcrunch.title: Meta is reportedly developing an AI pendant
techcrunch.summary: Meta seems to be making big bets on AI-powered hardware.

techcrunch.title: I put Google’s 24/7 AI assistant Gemini Spark to work, and it’s actually pretty useful
techcrunch.summary: Gemini Spark helps automate everyday tasks, from inbox summaries to local event planning, but it’s unclear why Google made it a separate product.

techcrunch.title: The groupthink boom: what 3 top VCs really think about the AI frenzy
techcrunch.summary: "If you're 22 years old in San Francisco and building something in AI, there may be a seed term sheet in your inbox — but if you're 19, oh my God, this means you're really good; you might already have a Series A [offer]," said one, half-kiddingly.
